# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),

## [utilityhub_config-v0.2.6] - 2026-03-23

### Features

- **config**: Update write_config to use JSON-safe serialization

- **docs**: Add configuration file management functions
